title: Notification when @mentioned on a Doc
excerpt:
Would be extremely useful to be able to receive a notification when @mentioned on a Doc. would like the same options as receiving a notification when @mentioned on a board. 
Thank You

posts.author: jon1 (Jonathan Hurr)
